suppress.notes: False positive: CVE-2022-31691 targets Spring Tools (STS4) and related VSCode extensions via SnakeYAML in YAML editors, not spring-boot-devtools. Devtools is used only in development and not shipped to production.
False positive: CVE-2026-24734 targets OCSP, which is not used in our project.

False positive: CVE-2020-29582 affects Kotlin before 2.1.0. All submodules resolve kotlin-stdlib and kotlin-reflect to 2.3.10 via kotlin-bom constraint. Transitive requests for older versions are all upgraded by Gradle conflict resolution. The scanner flags a stale kotlin-reflect-1.6.10.jar from the Gradle cache that is not on any classpath.
Only static resources serviing on Windows or WebFlux servers are affected.
